---
title: "UIAO_126 — Test Plans Program"
subtitle: "Canonical Catalog"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
description: "The canonical catalog of test plans across the UIAO substrate."
categories: [canon, programs, testing, ci]
---

{{< include ../_aspirational-notice.qmd >}}

::: {.callout-note}
## Canonical source
This page renders the canonical spec at
[`core/canon/specs/program-test-plans.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/core/canon/specs/program-test-plans.md).
The authoritative copy lives in `core/`. If you want the short
narrative explanation instead, read the
[companion walkthrough](../narrative/program-test-plans.qmd).
:::

{{< include ../../core/canon/specs/program-test-plans.md >}}
